CONTENT.Club career: N'Guinda made his professional debut on 2 February 2017 in the Coupe de France round of 32 against Chambly. He started the game and was replaced in the 78th minute by Irvin Cardona in a 5–4 away win.In July 2021, N'Guinda joined Créteil in the Championnat National.

SUMMARY: Pierre-Daniel N'Guinda N'Diffon (born 18 June 1996) is a Cameroonian professional footballer who plays as a right-back for Bulgarian club CSKA 1948.
